mechanism: A JSON file registers an application on the platform. The application profile workflow bootstraps Entra ID groups, Azure Invoice Section, and application GitHub repository.
why: A single registration bootstraps all application-specific platform state from one source. From that point the platform recognizes the application and enables self-service operations.

related.note: Action group sources engineer contact email from the profile.
Profile creation provisions the Invoice Section that scopes billing to the application.
Profile provides owner and engineer values for the tag baseline.
Profile must exist before a landing zone can be scaffolded.
Profile owner and engineer contacts are consumed by the landing zone identity for tag enforcement and incident routing.

violations: Landing zone bicepparam with hardcoded owner/engineer email instead of readEnvironmentVariable.
